chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4472 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 05.8.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2022, which has not been taken up in the last three years. The petitioner has made no efforts to have this petition fixed for hearing in the last three years. It is noted that since inception i.e. 02.8.2022, which is over three years ago, the counsel for the petitioner was directed to satisfy this Court about the maintainability of this petition. Today, despite lapse of three years, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
